replies.author: Educational_Cup6999
replies.body: This account is associated with the poster, he comments “can I DM you?” Or “DM’d you” on all his posts, and none of this guys stuff is original or is just blatantly a scam. I am a developer for a company that specializes in the development of proprietary indicators, strategies, and algorithms, and this douchebag just bounced between accounts posting scam bait to get people to DM them, absolutely no alpha will be found here.
